result.finding: No embedded language usage detected. The application is a pure Java implementation with no scripting engine, process execution, or native library loading. A client-side JavaScript file (upload.js) exists but is served as a static asset, not evaluated server-side.
evidence: No Runtime.getRuntime().exec() or ProcessBuilder in Java source
No ScriptEngineManager, GroovyShell, PythonInterpreter, JRuby, or Jython usage
No System.loadLibrary() or native method declarations
No groovy, jython, jruby, nashorn, or jna dependencies in pom.xml
src/main/resources/static/js/upload.js is a client-side static asset (not executed server-side)
